author: Xbox YouTube
text:
007 First Light – Launch Trailer
A James Bond re-imagined origin story begins on May 27, 2026.

Are you ready to go on this globetrotting adventure and #EarnTheNumber?

007 First Light comes to XBOX Series X|S, on May 27th, 2026.

Pre-order now and get a free Deluxe Edition Upgrade.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 - Purgation Update
Today’s Patch 13 comes with a new PvE mission, a major update to Siege Mode, and whole new sets of weapon and armour cosmetics, both free and paid.

Focus Entertainment and Saber Interactive are excited to announce the release of the Purgation Update for Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 at today’s Warhammer Skulls Festival. Available now free for all Xbox Series, this update brings a host of free content and the long-awaited Iron Hands Chapter Pack.

Discover all there is to know in today’s Purgation Update trailer!

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Deathmaster - Reveal Trailer
Play a sneaky & brutal Skaven Assassin in Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Deathmaster, a new, refreshing but gritty take on the 2D Action platformer genre coming 2027.

Skulk through an engaging 2D Action-platformer, reclaim stealth from the filth and shadows and delve into a grimy, unstable world and story.
Escape, Kill, Ascend and Become a Deathmaster.

© Copyright Games Workshop Limited 2026. Warhammer, the ‘winged-hammer’ Warhammer logo, Warhammer Age of Sigmar, the Warhammer Age of Sigmar logo, GW, Games Workshop, Warhammer and Stormcast Eternals are either ® or TM, and/or © Games Workshop Limited.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Chaos Gate - Deathwatch | Announcement Trailer
Wishlist Now!
 
Take direct command of an elite Deathwatch Kill Team in the next chapter of the brutal, turn-based tactical RPG Chaos Gate saga! Lead your Deathwatch Space Marines into battle against the enemies of mankind, supported by devoted agents of the Inquisition and Astra Militarum. Wage eternal war across hostile worlds, drive back deadly Xenos hordes and resist the insidious and corrupting forces of Chaos. 

Every decision matters within the grim darkness of the far future. 

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/warhammer-40000-chaos-gate-deathwatch/9P6ZW6ML05D14

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus II | Launch Trailer
Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus II | Launch Trailer

Two factions, two campaigns, one epic conflict. Out now on XBOX Series X|S.

XBOX: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9n3b790rkwtw

Watch the official launch trailer for Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus II, centred on the bitter rivalry between Magos Dominus Faustinius and Vargard Nefershah as the Adeptus Mechanicus and the Necrons collide in a war for the fate of a world.

Command the techno-religious forces of the Adeptus Mechanicus or lead the deathless legions of the Necrons across two full narrative campaigns, each offering its own distinct tactical and strategic challenges.

Featuring turn-based tactical combat, strategic campaign decisions and the return of the acclaimed Mechanicus atmosphere and soundtrack.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
STARSEEKER: Astroneer Expeditions - Release Date Trailer
STARSEEKER is a new game set within the Astroneer universe with a focus on discovery, cooperative expeditions, and camaraderie. 

Exploring deep space on the ESS Starseeker, players will need to work together with the entire crew of the space station to complete planet- wide objectives across a multitude of star systems using cutting edge technology.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/starseeker-astroneer-expeditions/9NTZH69PZSH0/

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Agni: Village of Calamity | Protocol Override | New Trailer
Wired Productions is proud to announce that we are publishing Agni: Village of Calamity, which is a cinematic survival horror game inspired by the greatest classics of horror media.

Agni, an investigator from a covert Indonesian police unit, defies orders and pushes into a remote village shrouded in warnings. What starts as a rogue investigation soon descends into something far more terrifying.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/agni-village-of-calamity/9MXH853MLV8B
